zh.lifeSummary: 當William Nichols於1599年出生在英國盧特藍德諾斯 盧費納姆時，他的父親William Francis Nicholls26歲，母親Ann Brown20歲。他於1639年與Mary Margaret Gengell在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1695年2月17日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可托普斯費爾德享年96歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可托普斯費爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Nichols于1599年出生在英国盧特藍德諾斯 盧費納姆时，他的父亲William Francis Nicholls26岁，母亲Ann Brown20岁。他于1639年与Mary Margaret Gengell在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1695年2月17日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可托普斯費爾德享年96岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可托普斯費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Nichols
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Nichol , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s. In North America, this surname has absorbed various cognates from other languages, e.g. Croatian and Serbian Nikolić (see Nikolic ); see also below.
Americanized form of various like-sounding Jewish surnames.

variants.name: Nicholls
meanings: English and Dutch: variant of   Nichols  .

variants.name: Nichol
meanings: Scottish and northern English: from the Middle English personal name Nic(h)ol(e), a vernacular form of Nic(h)olas (see Nicholas ). Compare Nickel and Nicol .

In some cases also an American shortened and altered form of Greek Nikolas , its variant Nicolas , or of any of various derivatives of the personal name Nikola(o)s ‘Nicholas’, including Nikolis (see Nicoli ). Compare Nicholas and Nicol .

variants.name: Nicols
meanings: English, Scottish, and Dutch: variant of   Nichols  . This surname is rare in the Netherlands.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

en.lifeSummary: When William Nichols was born in 1599, in North Luffenham, Rutland, England, his father, William Francis Nicholls, was 26 and his mother, Ann Brown, was 20. He married Mary Margaret Gengell in 1639, in Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died on 17 February 1695, in Topsfield, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 96, and was buried in Topsfield, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Nichols est né en 1599, à North Luffenham, Rutland, Angleterre, son père, William Francis Nicholls, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Ann Brown, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Mary Margaret Gengell en 1639, à Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 17 février 1695, à Topsfield, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 96 ans, et a été enterré à Topsfield, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Nichols 1599 in North Luffenham, Rutland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Francis Nicholls 26 und seine Mutter Ann Brown 20. Er hat 1639 in Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Mary Margaret Gengell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 17. Februar 1695 im Alter von 96 Jahren in Topsfield, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Topsfield, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Nichols è nato il nel 1599 nel North Luffenham, Rutland, England, il suo padre, William Francis Nicholls, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Ann Brown, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Mary Margaret Gengell nel 1639, nel Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì il 17 febbraio 1695, nel Topsfield, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 96 anni, e fu sepolto a Topsfield, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: William Nicholsが1599年にイギリスルトランドノース ルフエンハムで生まれた時，父William Francis Nichollsは26歳，母Ann Brownは20歳であった。1639年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーでMary Margaret Gengellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1695年2月17日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーエセックストプスフィールドで96歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーエセックストプスフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.Malden, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Col: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 맬든

ko.Hingham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colo: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 잉함

ko.lifeSummary: William Nichols(이)가 1599년 영국 루틀랜드 노르스 루펜함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Francis Nicholls(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Ann Brown(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1639년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이에서 Mary Margaret Gengell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1695년 2월 17일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 토프스필드에서 96세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 토프스필드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Nichols nasceu em 1599, em North Luffenham, Rutland, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Francis Nicholls, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Ann Brown, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Margaret Gengell em 1639, em Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 17 de fevereiro de 1695, em Topsfield, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 96 anos, e foi sepultado em Topsfield, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Nichols родился в 1599 г. в местности норт луффенам, рутланд, Англия, его отцу по имени William Francis Nicholls было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Ann Brown, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Margaret Gengell в 1639 г. в местности массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он умер 17 февраля 1695 г. в местности топсфиелд, эссекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 96 лет и был похоронен в местности топсфиелд, эссекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Nichols nació en 1599, en North Luffenham, Rutland, Inglaterra, su papá, William Francis Nicholls, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Ann Brown, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Mary Margaret Gengell en 1639, en Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió el 17 de febrero de 1695, en Topsfield, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 96 años, y fue sepultado en Topsfield, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
